text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and I use the coupon for the hot
spring trip she won at the lottery...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mom! Dad! There's a huge pond over there!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text: There really is! It's so beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...To come to the hot springs with her parents.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry we're tagging along on this trip. It must
be hard to fully relax with your trainee's parents
in tow...
choice_data_list:
It's not a problem. This trip is all for her, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text: Thank you so very much.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Let's go to the hot spring!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We spend a while in the hot springs...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I feel so refreshed! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Open-air baths are so much fun! Feeling cold and
hot at the same time—it was like eating ice cream
while sitting under a kotatsu. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Were you able to relax too, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Great! ♪
choice_data_list: By the way, where are your parents?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They said they wanted to head back to the room
first!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They kept worrying about whether they were
being a bother to you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The old me probably would've been right there
with them, but now...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I know you don't think of us like that.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I told them that you're really kind, and you
treasure the people I love as much as I do.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: And also...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: C-can I ask a favor?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Will you eat ice cream with me?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I know it's before dinner, so it's not a good idea...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But when I was thinking about eating ice cream
while under a kotatsu, it just sounded so good.
choice_data_list: We'll make it our little secret.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Let's make sure my mom and dad don't
find out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It's so rare that she asks for things for herself like
that. I'm glad she met such a wonderful trainer.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Our little girl is blessed, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mmm! This is delicious. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Can I, um... ask another favor?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Someday, when I've grown up more... I'd like to
come back here again with you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Can you promise me that, please?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Nishino Flower and I have forged an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
